description: Validates that .ai/agents/ markdown files conform to agent.schema.json

checks.description: Must contain ## Mission section (1 sentence, max 200 chars)
Must contain ## Scope section with 3+ bullet items
Must contain ## Inputs section with 1+ bullet items
Must contain ## Outputs section with 1+ bullet items
Must contain ## Rules section with 2+ bullet items
Agent must have an entry in .ai/agents/index.json
Agent must have a mapping in .ai/agenda.json
Mission must be 1 sentence (no line breaks)
